action_type: A — title/meta/on-page refinement for pos 4-10 keyword
summary: 1) Rewrote title tag from 'Digital Marketing Agency Abu Dhabi | Capital City SEO Experts' → 'Digital Marketing Agency Abu Dhabi | 5★ Rated | Free Audit' — adds trust signal (star rating) and CTA (free audit) to SERP snippet. 2) Rewrote meta description to include '200+ UAE clients', '5.0★ Google rating', and 'Get your free marketing audit today' — all high-CTR triggers. 3) Updated OpenGraph and Twitter Card metadata to match new title/description and fixed incorrect 4.9/5 → 5.0/5 rating. 4) Strengthened hero badge to '5.0★ Google Rating | 200+ UAE Clients | Abu Dhabi Digital Marketing Experts'. 5) Refined H2 to 'Abu Dhabi's Trusted SEO, PPC & Social Media Partner | Google Partner Certified' — includes service keywords naturally. 6) Rewrote intro paragraph to open with a question ('Looking for a results-driven digital marketing agency in Abu Dhabi?') matching search intent, and added brand name for entity recognition. 7) Fixed stats section: 4.9/5 → 5.0/5 with '(47 Reviews)' for credibility. 8) Refined final CTA heading and description to reinforce 'Abu Dhabi business' keyword.
expected_impact: Improved SERP CTR from trust signals in title (★ rating) and actionable meta description. Better keyword-intent alignment in H2 and intro. Data consistency fix (5.0 vs 4.9) builds trust. Expected: pos 9 → pos 5-7 in 2-4 weeks, with CTR improvement from ~0% to 3-5% as position improves.
